description: Subscription plans with pricing, seat limits, and trial availability

ai_model_tier.description: Default AI model tier for this plan (e.g. haiku, sonnet)

badge_text.description: Short label shown in upgrade badges (e.g. Pro — $29/mo)

cta_text.description: Call-to-action button text (e.g. Start free trial)

description.description: One-line plan description for pricing UI

has_trial.description: Whether this plan offers a 14-day free trial

is_highlighted.description: Visually highlight this plan in pricing UI (e.g. most popular)

price_monthly.description: Base monthly price in USD (0 for custom pricing)

price_per_seat.description: Additional cost per extra seat in USD (0 if no per-seat billing)

seats_included.description: Number of seats included in base price

slug.description: Plan identifier used in database and code

sort_order.description: Display order in pricing UI (0 = first)

name: Plans
